per_file_limit_checked.source: https://huggingface.co/docs/hub/storage-limits (fetched 2026-07-17: 'File size <200GB split data into chunked files' recommendation; 'no single file will exceed 500GB. I.e. 500GB is the hard limit for a single file size.')
per_file_limit_checked.verdict: ship_gguf (25200652096 bytes, ~23.47 GiB) is well under both the 200GB recommendation and the 500GB hard limit -- single file, no llama-gguf-split needed
